'''Camden''' was a terrestrial<ref name="CSWE" /> [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="CRO" /> located in the [[Camden system/Legends|Camden system]], a part of the [[Morshdine sector/Legends|Morshdine sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> A [[Axxila–Tangrene hyperlane/Legends|hyperlane]] connected it to the [[Edusa system/Legends|Edusa]] and [[Vandyne system/Legends|Vandyne systems]].<ref name="TEA" />

A [[Merchant/Legends|trade]] world, Camden saw intense traffic of small [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]]. Its main [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]], which served as an important fringe society crossroads point, was commonly known as [["Snakes' Den"|"Snakes' Den."]] Adjacent to the spaceport was a [[Restaurant/Legends|restaurant]] and [[Cantina/Legends|bar]] named the [[Jade Simian]].<ref name="CRO" />

At some point by the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Alien/Legends|alien]] known as [[Eyes (information broker)|Eyes]] became an [[Information broker/Legends|information broker]] who maintained a large network of informants. Eyes, who was initially based out of "Snakes' Den," eventually began holding organized meetings at the Jade Simian with people interested in trading information with them. Shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]] noted Eyes' operations on Camden in an entry dedicated to them that was part of a [[Datafile/Legends|datafile]] detailing various Rebel operatives.<ref name="CRO" />

==Behind the scenes==
Camden was created by [[Sean Patrick Fannon]] and was introduced in ''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'', a [[1994]] [[West End Games]] sourcebook published for use with ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="CRO" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Camden [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet itself, in grid square O-5.<ref name="TEA" />
